basic_details.job_title: TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) has officially announced the Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening under Advt. No. TMC/AD/97/2026. Candidates who are not more than 30 years of age and possess qualifications such as B.Sc. in Life Science/B.Pharm with PGDCR, M.Sc. Clinical Research, or M.Sc. in Life Science/M.Pharm with PGDCR/M.Sc. Clinical Research are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their online applications on or before 12 June 2026. Selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from ₹29,000 to ₹34,000 per month on a contractual basis. Direct lin

qualification.education_qualification: BSc in Life Science/B.Pharm with Post Graduate Diploma in Clinical Research(PGDCR) or BSc in Life Science/B.Pharm with MSc Clinical Research or MSc in Life Science/M.Pharm with PGDCR or MSc in Life Science/M.Pharm with MSc in Clinical Research
qualification.details: BSc in Life Science/B.Pharm with Post Graduate Diploma in Clinical Research(PGDCR) (Mandatory) BSc in Life Science/B.Pharm with MSc Clinical Research (Mandatory) MSc in Life Science/M.Pharm with PGDCR (Mandatory) MSc in Life Science/M.Pharm with MSc in Clinical Research MSc Clinical Research Students completing internship on 31-07-2026 may also apply

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TMC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TMC Clinical Research Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TMC Clinical Research Coordinator position is 12th June 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Clinical Research Coordinator post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a BSc in Life Science/B.Pharm with a Post Graduate Diploma in Clinical Research (PGDCR) or an MSc in Life Science/M.Pharm with PGDCR or an MSc in Clinical Research. Specific combinations are detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Clinical Research Coordinator position is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Clinical Research Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 29,000 to Rs. 34,000.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Clinical Research Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Clinical Research Coordinator position at Tata Memorial Centre.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a screening followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Clinical Research Coordinator position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Tata Memorial Centre located?
faq.answer: Tata Memorial Centre is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q10. Can students completing their internship soon apply?
faq.answer: Yes, MSc Clinical Research students completing their internship on 31-07-2026 are eligible to apply.
